title: Occupational Health and Safety * COVID-19 - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Occupational Health and Safety * COVID-19 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON OCCUPATIONAL SAFETY AND HEALTH DIVISION OCCUPATIONAL HEALTH AND SAFETY DIVISION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Reviews and investigates worker complaints regarding safety and health on the job, inspects work sites, investigates on-the-job accidents and deaths, and consults with employers regarding accident prevention requirements. Occupational Safety and Health issues are the focus. Online services include ordering videos, publications, and rules; registering for workshops; taking safety classes; and obtaining radio signal permits. 350 Winter Street NE 3rd Floor Salem, OR 97309 Eligibility: Individuals who are employees or employers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 378-3272 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON OCCUPATIONAL SAFETY AND HEALTH DIVISION OCCUPATIONAL HEALTH AND SAFETY DIVISION
